New chat
Greeting and Assistance
hi
Hi! What can I help you with today?
say back hello
hello
nd now bye
bye 👋
k
👍
hi
hi again—what do you need?
why cant i edit an old message
Most chat systems (including this one) don't let you edit older messages once they've been sent.
can edit the last one, just not really old ones
1/2
Right—that's the typical behavior. Most systems allow editing only the most recent message.
ok
👍 Got it. If anything else comes up, just say the word.

f
